reach_why: Extends known worries about simplicity bias and priors, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects compression bias, search pruning, representational priors, and bizarre particulars in a sharp, non-obvious synthesis.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing evaluators on messy domains; counterexamples show compression need not erase causally relevant particulars.
explanation: Elegant search heuristics can systematically miss truth when reality depends on ugly, literal, causally important details.
